Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}So, I was hoping you could watch me as I make the coffee...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Okay, the beans are freshly ground and accurately measured. The water is about 90 degrees Celsius.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Now, the pace and angle when pouring the water are really important. All right, here I go.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Pour slowly and quietly, in a circular motion...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}You'll know you're doing it right when it starts smelling really good![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 1 25 25}It's not exactly what you'd get at a café, but I think I've improved a lot.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}There's so much to consider when making coffee. I get why people are so particular about it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Um, I know it's a bit weird to ask at this point, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}When do you feel like drinking coffee the most?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}That does seem to be common for a lot of people.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}The taste and smell are a signal to start the day. It's sort of like flipping a switch in your head.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Oh, I see... You know, that's the weird thing about the smell of coffee.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 1 25 25}Drinking it is supposed to wake us up, but the smell has a relaxing effect, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Oh... Are you more of a tea person, like Mitsuru-san?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}In all honesty, I never really went out of my way to drink it, either.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}...When my mom was still alive, the house used to smell like this every morning.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Now I realize how often she'd make coffee, even on days she was busy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}I saw on TV the other day that smells and memories are linked closely together.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}The smell of coffee reminded me of my mom. But in your case...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}I wonder if it'll remind you of the times we spent here, drinking coffee together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Well, I better try extra hard when I'm making coffee for you, then![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}It'd be pretty sad if you only remembered my coffee being bitter.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}In that case, I'd better practice and treat you to another cup while we still have time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}It'd be pretty sad if you only remembered my coffee being bitter.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}I feel like I haven't gotten into something like this for a long time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}I also think it's helped me practice staying focused. Maybe it's because I've been doing it so diligently.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Amada looks so satisfied[n]as he talks about coffee...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Because of you, I think I understand the taste of coffee a little better now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}{f 4 22 0 8 9 25 8}Besides, if my mom liked it, I'm sure I will too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}...Oh, there's still more, if you want a refill![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}I've gotten a lot better now, so I hope you'll join me again sometime![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Next time, it's gonna be even better than it was today![n]{f 1 1}
